title: ACES Scenario Pack — Delivery Bundle (v0)
description: Describes a pack's audience and packaging in portable scenario-pack terms. It does not define downstream portal, class-management, scoreboard, or release-channel behavior.

packId.description: Pack this delivery bundle applies to.

audience.description: Intended audience in portable, ACES-native terms.

format.description: Portable packaging format for the bundle.

contents.description: What the bundle contains, in pack-native terms.
